name: dinp
description: Design in Product plugin marketplace (xian's umbrella org). Hosts PM-shaped and product-ops Claude plugins. Live: piper-morgan. Planned siblings: klatch, cross-pollinator. Sibling plugins share a cross-context company profile at ~/.claude/plugins/config/dinp/company-profile.md. Currently skunkworks-staged; designed to graduate to a hosted marketplace.

plugins.name: piper-morgan
plugins.description: Piper Morgan as a Claude plugin (BYOC PoC): three layered skills over a local MCP server. meet-piper learns how YOU work as a PM (two-mode: serial cold-start interview on first install, compact scoped update on return); ask-piper relays a question to your local Piper; consult-piper gathers missing context from GitHub and re-asks with honest provenance. Server-owned config works on every surface. Requires PIPER_BASE_URL set to your hosted Piper instance (or leave unset to default to localhost:8001 for local dev).
